subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast warbled with the melody of the nightingale in the garden of praise! Thou hast intoned the verses of thy longing and unfurled the poem [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من صدح بلحن الورقاء فی حدیقه الثناء قد رتلت ایات شوقک و انشرت القصیده
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Manifestation of God as sun, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual transformation
